proof fn det_create_iommu_table_l2_entry(pre_self_: MemoryManager, target_ioid: IOid, target_l4i: L4Index, target_l3i: L3Index, target_l2i: L2Index, target_l2_p: PageMapPtr, page_map_ptr: PageMapPtr, ?: Tracked<PointsTo<PageMap>>, post1_self_: MemoryManager, r1: (), post2_self_: MemoryManager, r2: ())
    requires (pre_self_.wf()), (pre_self_.ioid_active(target_ioid)), (0 <= target_l4i < 512), (0 <= target_l3i < 512), (0 <= target_l2i < 512), (pre_self_.get_iommu_table_by_ioid(target_ioid).unwrap().spec_resolve_mapping_l3(
                target_l4i,
                target_l3i,
            ).is_Some()), (pre_self_.get_iommu_table_by_ioid(target_ioid).unwrap().spec_resolve_mapping_1g_l3(

                target_l3i,
            ).is_None()), (pre_self_.get_iommu_table_by_ioid(target_ioid).unwrap().spec_resolve_mapping_l3(
                target_l4i,
                target_l3i,
            ).unwrap().addr == target_l2_p), (page_ptr_valid(page_map_ptr)), (pre_self_.page_closure().contains(page_map_ptr) == false), (page_map_perm.addr() == page_map_ptr), (page_map_perm.is_init()), (page_map_perm.value().wf()), (forall|i: usize|
                #![trigger page_map_perm.value()[i].is_empty()]
                0 <= i < 512 ==> page_map_perm.value()[i].is_empty()), (forall|ioid: IOid, va: VAddr|
                #![trigger pre_self_.get_iommu_table_mapping_by_ioid(ioid).dom().contains(va)]
                #![trigger pre_self_.get_iommu_table_mapping_by_ioid(ioid)[va]]

                ).dom().contains(va) ==> pre_self_.get_iommu_table_mapping_by_ioid(ioid)[va].addr
                    != page_map_ptr),

            &&& (post1_self_.kernel_entries_ghost =~= pre_self_.kernel_entries_ghost)

                post1_self_.pcid_active(p) ==> pre_self_.pcid_to_proc_ptr(p) == post1_self_.pcid_to_proc_ptr(p))
            &&& (forall|i: IOid|
                #![trigger post1_self_.ioid_active(i)]
                post1_self_.ioid_active(i) == pre_self_.ioid_active(i))
            &&& (forall|i: IOid|

            &&& (post1_self_.get_iommu_table_by_ioid(target_ioid).unwrap().mapping_4k() =~= pre_self_.get_iommu_table_by_ioid(target_ioid).unwrap().mapping_4k())
            &&& (post1_self_.get_iommu_table_by_ioid(target_ioid).unwrap().mapping_2m() =~= pre_self_.get_iommu_table_by_ioid(target_ioid).unwrap().mapping_2m())
            &&& (post1_self_.get_iommu_table_by_ioid(target_ioid).unwrap().mapping_1g() =~= pre_self_.get_iommu_table_by_ioid(target_ioid).unwrap().mapping_1g())
            &&& (post1_self_.get_iommu_table_by_ioid(target_ioid).unwrap().spec_resolve_mapping_1g_l3(
